since_last: 8% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.15%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 8% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -1.67% · Gold -2.14%. 8% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.15%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.15%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +9.19%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +9.19%, BIDU +4.38%, AVAV +1.43%, D +1.17%, DLR +0.84%. Laggards: MU -4.01%, CEVA -3.95%, MDB -3.69%, RXRX -3.65%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.70% at $150.51
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.70% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
